purpose: Pin the single-agent solver route before scaling the SWE-bench Pro corpus so future powered-corpus rows are reproducible and defensible.

prior_seed_pilot.boundary: The seed pilot remains valid real execution evidence, but scaled powered-corpus runs must use the pinned runner below rather than inferring the missing runner details from the pilot.

litellm_route.public_artifact_secret_policy: record env var name only; never commit token value

pinned_runner.solver_command_template_bokken: After exporting SWEBENCH_SOLVER_LITELLM_AUTH_TOKEN in the operator shell, run: /home/bokken/codex-swebench-pro-benchmark/repo-main/.venv/bin/python -m supervisor.swe_bench_solver --solver claude-code-litellm-haiku-real-swebench-pro-pilot --allow-live --max-budget-usd <per-instance-budget-usd> --k <attempts-per-instance> --runner-command '<runner_command_bokken>'

instance_roster_gate_before_scaling.why: The seed pilot observed roughly one usable oracle-runnable instance out of four attempts; solver budget should be spent only after run_scripts preflight and a dry oracle run prove selected instances are runnable.
preflight_steps: Run preflight_swe_bench_pro_run_scripts over the candidate instance ids using .scratch/SWE-bench_Pro-os/run_scripts or another pinned clone of scaleapi/SWE-bench_Pro-os.

Run a dry Pro oracle/gold-patch check for each selected instance and keep only instances with patch_applied=true, non-empty parsed tests, fail_to_pass_status=pass, pass_to_pass_status=pass, and test_command_return_code=0.
Record excluded instances and concrete oracle unavailable reasons, including pro_script_missing, pro_parser_output_empty, pro_oracle_bucket_empty, dependency-install timeouts, and container failures.

known_seed_observations.evidence: seed pilot produced 2 oracle-good and 1 oracle-bad candidates including gold backstop
generation started but oracle container was still in dependency installation after qutebrowser seed success

scaling_gate.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use min_good=1 or min_bad=1 for a powered claim; that can make a run look completed while underpowered.
scaling_gate.labeling: report-only swe_bench_held_out_test_pass_proxy; do not call it maintainer mergeability
scaling_gate.cross_family_expectation: Expect reviewer cross-family proof to remain unverified unless a real out-of-band provider-family attestation exists; report it as operator-asserted/unverified rather than verified.
